commit.message:
fix: Telegram bot improvements — inspect, dedup, context (#54)

* fix: handle Anthropic tool_use finish_reason in agent loop

The agent loop checked for finish_reason == "tool_calls" (OpenAI
format) but Anthropic returns "tool_use". This caused the loop to
break after round 1 without processing tool results, producing
empty responses ("no response generated").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add /inspect command to Telegram bot

Shows tool actions, sources, and timing from the last query.
Also captures statuses, sources, and perf_trace events from
the chat SSE stream for inspection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent duplicate Telegram messages from Claude Code sessions

[NOTIFY] messages were sent during assistant events AND re-extracted
from the result event, causing duplicates. Now skips re-extraction
when notifications were already sent during the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: detect imperative follow-ups for conversation context retention

"look in my email", "check my calendar", "search drive for it" etc.
were not recognized as follow-ups, so the previous question's context
was lost. Added regex pattern for imperative verbs + data source nouns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add tests for PR review findings; strip PII from /inspect

- Add unit tests for expand_followup_query imperative patterns
- Add tests for orchestrator notification dedup (notifications_sent > 0)
- Move _IMPERATIVE_FOLLOWUP_RE to module level per convention
- Strip tool input args from /inspect output (show tool name only)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix core icon_url not appearing: add missing field to toCore mapper

The toCore() function explicitly maps all fields but was missing icon_url,
so the DB value was silently dropped despite SELECT * fetching it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ingest): reduce CDN fetch timeout and remove redundant second call

CDN fetch was 180s × 3 retries = 9 min, called twice = 18 min of
blocking. Signal Desktop became unresponsive processing SSL errors on
hundreds of attachments, causing _get_desktop_messages to time out and
the entire job to fail despite successful sync.

Reduced to 30s × 1 attempt. Removed redundant second CDN fetch call.
Increased message fetch timeout to 180s for large groups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Unallocated Boxes report page

Shows lots with boxes not yet allocated to pallets, highlighting
counting errors and packing mispractices. Includes summary stats,
color-coded rows by severity, and CSV export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix athlete cards overflow bik k8 (#107)

* Fix iOS DOM corruption: CSS guardrail + MutationObserver replaces timing-dependent checks

Previous fixes used useEffect/setTimeout to detect orphaned <main> elements,
but these have a fundamental timing race — the check fires before or after
the corruption is detectable. This new approach uses two layers:

1. CSS `main:has(~ main) { display: none }` hides stale pages instantly
   before paint, with zero JS involvement
2. MutationObserver in ScrollRestorer proactively removes orphaned <main>
   nodes the moment they appear in the DOM

Removes checkDomIntegrity from ServiceWorkerRegistrar since the
MutationObserver now handles it continuously.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Myv3jTCMiyNePbtsZZZykT

* Revert aggressive DOM guardrails that crashed React on every page load

The MutationObserver in ScrollRestorer removed <main> elements from the DOM,
then React tried to removeChild on those same nodes and threw NotFoundError.
The CSS rule main:has(~ main) could also hide content during hydration.

Fix: remove both guardrails and restore a safe checkDomIntegrity() that only
runs on visibilitychange (page returning from background) and does a full
page reload instead of DOM surgery — safe because it's a clean restart.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Myv3jTCMiyNePbtsZZZykT

---------

feat(ui): add Linux native GTK4 backend with reactive flow fixes and ui.html widget

Introduce GTK4-based native UI rendering alongside the existing terminal and
browser backends. The reactive flow engine now caps update cycles at 255 to
prevent infinite loops. The RSS reader example is refactored to use individual
single-output event handlers instead of a multi-output Update func, fixing
state corruption from multi-emit returns. New ui.html() widget renders HTML
content via Pango markup in GTK and passes through raw HTML in the browser.

standalone for RAILPACK auto-detection but override startCommand in

files. Removed builder/buildCommand since RAILPACK handles builds.
Fixed CWD assumption (removed `cd apps/web` since Root Directory
is already apps/web).

commit.message:
fix: copy only external deps and prune Prisma to reduce deploy to ~21MB

Instead of npm install (which bloats to 472MB), copy only the specific
external packages from build node_modules. Also:
- Remove @prisma/engines entirely (uses WASM query compiler, not native)
- Remove non-postgresql WASM compilers (cockroachdb, mysql, sqlite, sqlserver)
- Remove source maps and type declarations from Prisma runtime
- Remove generator-build (only needed for prisma generate)

Deploy package: 273MB -> 21MB (92% reduction)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Slack change announcements for repo merges

Announce newly merged PRs to separate Slack channels: core repo
changes to a dedicated core channel, wrapper repo changes to
per-city channels. Bot PRs are silently ignored. Tracks repo
branch HEADs independently from deployment detection via
data/repo-heads.json. Fault-isolated — Slack failures don't
block the pipeline.

commit.message:
Update tech stack to reflect current skills from marco33.fr (#4)

Expanded and reorganized the Tech Stack section to showcase the full range of current expertise, including modern runtime (Bun), frontend frameworks (React Native, Shadcn UI), databases (Dragonfly, ClickHouse), ORMs (Drizzle, Prisma), advanced blockchain tooling (Foundry, Viem, Squid SDK), and DevOps infrastructure (Docker, Grafana, Prometheus, Coolify). Removed outdated frameworks and services no longer in active use.

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(api): Make disk check non-fatal and increase RSS threshold to 2GB

Disk usage on managed platforms (Railway/K8s) is outside app control
and should not cause 503 on /health/detailed. RSS threshold increased
from 1GB to 2GB since Node.js RSS includes native memory beyond heap.

- Update news section with real recent events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Render 재시작 시 401 오류로 인한 로그아웃 방지

서버 재시작(502/503)으로 토큰 갱신에 실패하면 원래 401이 재throw되는데,
_layout.tsx가 이를 '진짜 만료'로 오해하고 로그아웃 처리하던 문제 수정.

인터셉터는 진짜 만료 확인 시에만 accessToken을 삭제하므로,
401 에러 후 스토리지에 토큰이 남아있으면 서버 일시 불가로 판단해 인증 상태 유지.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(engine): release Stuck friction limiter and early silence onset (v2.18)

p_stuck was structurally capped at ~5% due to low friction clamp
bounds (0.45/0.35) and late silence path onset (5s). Release clamp
to 1.0 with faster ramp divisors, lower silence threshold to 2s,
and smooth Incubation x=1 emission cliff (y=1: 0.10→0.08).
Stuck now reachable at ~30s sustained silence, enabling Nudge/Wall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix audio mismatch gate: MySQL ENUM expansion, numpy type casting, threshold tuning

- Expand MySQL ENUM for mimic_sessions.status to include 'audio_mismatch'
  via ALTER TABLE MODIFY COLUMN in migration (MySQL doesn't auto-expand)
- Add values_callable to Enum(MimicSessionStatus) so SQLAlchemy uses
  lowercase .value strings matching what MySQL stores (fixes KeyError: 'ready')
- Cast np.float32 to native float() before persisting audio_confidence/offset
  (pymysql rejects numpy types)
- Raise audio confidence threshold from 5.0 to 10.0 (conf ~5 is noise,
  real matches are ~56+)
- Add admin Frame Data download button for mimic sessions

commit.message:
fix(api): Return status 'up' with degraded flag for non-fatal health checks

Terminus v11 HealthCheckExecutor treats resolved values with
status 'down' as errors, causing 503 even when the promise doesn't
reject. Change storage/telegram catch handlers to return status 'up'
with a degraded flag so the overall /health/detailed endpoint stays
200 when only optional services are unavailable.

fix: stop writing thinkingDefault on individual agent entries

OpenClaw's AgentEntrySchema is strict and does not allow thinkingDefault
on agents.list[] items. This field is only valid at agents.defaults level.
Writing it to individual agents caused Zod validation failure and gateway
crash on startup.

feat(saju-mbti): 앱 전면 개선 - 7단계 리팩토링 완료

Phase 1: 기반 레이어
- UserProfile 타입 + storage CRUD 메서드 추가

Phase 2: 재사용 컴포넌트

- SkeletonLoader: 글래스모피즘 로딩 스켈레톤

Phase 3: 운세 점수 시스템

- 주간 점수, 트렌드 분석 (rising/stable/falling)

Phase 4: 신규 페이지
- 온보딩: 3단계 위저드 (환영 → 정보입력 → 캐릭터 공개)
- 프로필: 캐릭터 히어로 + 정보 수정 + 알림 설정

Phase 5: UX 개선
- 홈 리디자인: 프로필 기반 인사말 + 캐릭터 히어로
- 네비게이션: 오늘운세/내정보 탭 추가, MBTI 탭 제거
- DailyFortuneWidget: 운세 점수 + 트렌드 + 온보딩 CTA

Phase 6: 오늘의 운세 강화
- 주간 뷰 탭 (오늘 | 이번 주)
- 7일 점수 카드 + 바 차트 + 주간 요약

Phase 7: 폴리시
- 사주/운명 페이지 프로필 프리필 + 유효성 검사
- 운명 캐릭터 페이지 BirthInfoForm 적용

- 스캔 페이지 stale closure 버그 수정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial implementation of Wave accounting MCP server

6 FastMCP tools wrapping the full Wave GraphQL API (52 operations):
- account: chart of accounts CRUD + archive + search
- party: customers (full CRUD) + vendors (read-only)
- transaction: invoices (full lifecycle + payments) + money transactions (BETA)
- item: products & services CRUD + archive + search
- reference: businesses, users, currencies, countries, sales taxes, estimates
- report: synthesized business summary, account balances, customer balances

Static Bearer token auth, async httpx with rate-limit backoff,
dual transport (STDIO/SSE on port 3076).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
